item.title: Iran's top diplomat expected in Pakistan on Friday night to discuss peace plans: MS NOW
item.description: President Donald Trump said he is in no rush to make a peace deal, claiming the Iran war has harmed stocks and oil prices less than he expected.

item.title: DOJ drops criminal probe of Fed Chair Powell
U.S. soldier arrested for Polymarket bets on Maduro capture that won $400K, Justice Department says
item.description: The arrest comes as concerns have grown about people with inside information making bets on the Polymarket and Kalshi prediction markets.

item.title: AI data center backlash threatens Pennsylvania GOP incumbents in 2026 election
item.description: Pennsylvania has four competitive House races in 2026, all of which are in areas where Gov. Josh Shapiro has AI data center expansion plans.

item.title: Trump warns of ‘big tariff’ if UK doesn’t drop digital services tax on U.S. tech firms
item.description: The tax is a 2% levy on the revenues of search engines, social media services and online marketplaces that derive value from U.K. users.
